title: Jams
description: Collaborative coding workshops where sparks ignite, fears dissolve, and inventions come to life

title: Sleepover
description: Learn to code, earn prizes like plushies and iPads, and fly out to an all girls slumber party in Chicago!

title: Horizons
description: 7 hackathons. 7 countries. The adventure of a lifetime. Join us in SF, Toronto, South America, Europe, Singapore, Africa, and Australia!

title: Stasis
description: Get your hardware projects funded and fly to the coolest hardware hackathon in Austin, Texas this May.

title: Fallout
description: Build hardware projects, track your hours, then attend a hardware hackathon in Shenzhen!

title: Macondo
description: Make hardware or software projects, win free prizes, and fly to Bogotá, Colombia for a hackathon!

title: Hack Club: The Game
description: Build projects, then compete in a scavenger hunt adventure game across Manhattan!

title: Boba Drops
description: Build a static site with HTML and CSS, get free boba!

title: Putting The "You" In CPU
description: Curious exactly what happens when you run a program on your computer? Read this.

title: Sprig
description: Join hundreds of teenagers making tile-based JavaScript games

title: Some Assembly Required
description: The 4th most starred Assembly repository on GitHub

title: SineRider
description: Help build a game about love, math, and graphing 💖

title: Nest
description: Free Linux server for all Hack Clubbers to host anything they need

title: YSWS Programs
description: Build something amazing, and Hack Club will ship you something epic in return.
